TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Santimon_go, title = Santimon_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Santimon_go} }

S.FORM: Santimon go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 185.9 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 94.02 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 85.25 km²), 7,698 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,296 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 7,320 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 95%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Santimon go ays psgayun 10 ru 12 alang. 12 alang hani ga, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan .

Santimon go mki sku Heto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 185.9 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 94.02 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 85.25 km²), 7,698 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,296 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 7,320 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 95%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Santimon go ays psgayun 10 ru 12 alang. 12 alang hani ga, Timur , Tjavatjavang , Valjulu , Paridrayan , Sagaran , Talamakau , Cavak , Djineljepan , Tjailjaking , Kingdalruwane , Tjukuvulj , Tjusepayuan .
S.PHON: s~ɕantimon ɣo mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.* km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan, rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu s~ɕantimon ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, timur , tja*atja*aŋ , *aljulu , pari*rajan , s~ɕaɣaran , talamakau , ʦ~ʨa*ak , *jineljepan , tjailjakiŋ , kiŋ*alruwane , tjuku*ulj , tjus~ɕepajuan .
